description: Migros is a Turkish retail and e-commerce company operating grocery delivery, food delivery, personal care, pet shop, and electronics shopping services through its online storefront and related sub-brands. The migros.com.tr site is primarily a consumer shopping experience for browsing products, campaigns, and placing orders.
summary: migros.com.tr exposes a public consumer web storefront and an llms.txt file, but no developer-facing HTTP APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, or CLIs were discoverable on migros.com.tr.
